name: Kinnikuman (D)
notes: This was the fourth kinkeshi version of the Kinnikuman character, which is why he has the “D” designation. A Light Purple version was available with the board game.

name: Buffaloman (B)
notes: The translated Kinnikuman name of this figure is Buffalo Man. However, M.U.S.C.L.E. collectors know this character as Terri-Bull – one of the two M.U.S.C.L.E. figures with names (the other figure is Muscleman). This was the second version of “Buffalo Man” from the original Kinnikuman release.

name: Sunshine (C)
origin: Idol Chojin from the Devil Knights
